message:
fix(observability): fall back to state clock in diagnostics when timer driver absent

The now() helper in the diagnostics module fell back to Time::ZERO when
no timer driver was present, which meant leaked-obligation ages were always
reported as zero in timerless test environments. This made diagnostics
useless for catching obligation leaks during LabRuntime testing.

Changed the fallback to use self.state.now so ages are computed relative
to the state clock, which is always available. Added a dedicated test
verifying correct behavior in timerless environments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
